title: stellaria oligosperma
intro: Stellaria oligosperma, also known as less celandine or small flowered celandine, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its yellow flowers and hairy stems. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Stellaria oligosperma are attributed to its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce swelling and alleviate digestive issues. Stellaria oligosperma is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies.
